“消费者报告”(Consumer Reports)在一份新的排名中宣布，凯迪拉克超级巡航(Cadillac Super Cruise)保住了市场上最佳驾驶员辅助系统的头衔。超级邮轮上一次荣登CR&39；排行榜是在2018年。虽然超级巡航一开始只是凯迪拉克的一项功能，但通用汽车计划到2023年将其推广到22辆。
根据“消费者报告”，特斯拉的Autopilot排在第二位，远远排在第二位。该集团表示，自2018年对该系统进行上一次评估以来，特斯拉的车道保持性能略有改善。
这些微小的改进足以让Autopilot在CR&39；报告中的车道保持和性能类别中位居榜首。CR对Autopilot的性能评分为9/10，而Super Cruise的评分为8/10。特斯拉在Autopilot的易用性方面也获得了最高分。
但凯迪拉克(Cadillac)的司机监控系统得分要高得多-7分，而特斯拉为3分。凯迪拉克超级巡航使用面向司机的摄像头来验证司机的眼睛是否盯着道路。该系统使用灯光和声音来积极地提醒司机，如果他们不再注意。相比之下，特斯拉使用方向盘扭矩传感器来确定司机是否握住了方向盘。正如CR指出的那样，手放在方向盘上并不一定意味着司机确实在看着前方的道路。
CR还称赞凯迪拉克将Super Cruise的使用限制在预先绘制地图的高速公路上。通用汽车已经制作了横跨美国的数千英里高速公路的详细地图。这些地图帮助Super Cruise了解道路，并允许车辆在司机需要驾驶时提前提醒他们。特斯拉因允许在居民区使用Autopilot而受到处罚-居民区的司机需要特别注意避免撞到行人或其他障碍物。
最后，CR发现，如果司机变得没有反应-例如，因为她睡着了或心脏病发作，超级巡航在安全停车方面做得最好。
通用汽车在设计超级巡洋舰时采取了安全第一的方式。将Super Cruise限制在预先绘制的区域，并积极提醒用户注意道路，将Super Cruise导致撞车的可能性降至最低。然而，这可能会惹恼那些不喜欢自己的车的用户，限制了他们的能力。
相比之下，特斯拉将司机的便利性和自主性放在首位。特斯拉允许司机在各种各样的道路上激活Autopilot。该技术的早期版本甚至对司机的参与更加宽容，允许司机在很长一段时间内将手从方向盘上移开。在2016年发生第一起与自动驾驶相关的致命撞车事故后，特斯拉开始收紧要求双手放在方向盘上的规定。但与通用汽车相比，特斯拉的系统限制仍然较少。缺乏积极的驾驶员监控系统可能是最近涉及特斯拉汽车的致命撞车事故的一个因素。
因此，虽然赢得总排名对通用汽车来说无疑是件好事，但“消费者报告”的结果丝毫不会挫伤特斯拉车迷的热情，他们认为咄咄逼人的司机监控系统令人讨厌。
CR测试的其他系统都无法脱颖而出。特斯拉或凯迪拉克在CR评选的五个子类别中都获得了冠军。林肯/福特联合飞行员360系统是仅次于特斯拉的亚军，紧随其后的是奥迪、现代、梅赛德斯-奔驰和斯巴鲁的系统。
但值得注意的是，这些系统在市场上正变得越来越普遍。当CR在2018年进行第一次评估时，它只测试了四个系统。现在市场上有17个系统，几乎每个主要的汽车制造商都提供一个。
我不介意CR批评特斯拉，让他们称之为更轻松的司机参与方式，但给一个系统更高的分数似乎有点违反直觉，因为它在更少的地点可以买到。
然而，可用性并不是唯一重要的指标。如果它完全满足于允许司机撞上护栏和半挂车，那么可用性又有什么好处呢？
note_en:
Cadillac Super Cruise has retained its title as the best driver assistance system on the market, Consumer Reports declared in a  new ranking. Super Cruise also won  CR's last ranking in 2018. While Super Cruise started out as a Cadillac-only feature, GM is planning to bring it to 22 vehicles by 2023.
 Tesla's Autopilot came in second place—a "distant second" according to Consumer Reports. The group says it saw "minor improvements in lane keeping performance" from Tesla's offering since the system was last evaluated in 2018.
 Those minor improvements were enough for Autopilot to get the top spot in the "lane keeping and performance" category of CR's report. CR ranked Autopilot 9/10 for performance, while Super Cruise scored 8/10. Tesla also got top marks for Autopilot's ease of use.
 But Cadillac got a much better score—seven points versus three for Tesla—for its driver monitoring system. Cadillac Super Cruise uses a driver-facing camera to verify that the driver has their eyes on the road. The system uses lights and sounds to aggressively alert the driver if they stop paying attention. By contrast, Tesla uses a steering wheel torque sensor to determine whether the driver is holding the wheel. As CR points out, having hands on the wheel "does not necessarily mean the driver is actually looking at the road ahead."
 CR also gave Cadillac credit for limiting the use of Super Cruise to pre-mapped highways. GM has made detailed maps of thousands of miles of highway across the US. The maps help Super Cruise understand the road and allows the vehicle to alert drivers ahead of time if they need to take the wheel. Tesla got dinged for allowing the use of Autopilot in residential areas—areas where drivers need to pay especially close attention to avoid hitting pedestrians or other obstacles.
 Finally, CR found that Super Cruise did the best job of safely bringing the vehicle to a stop if the driver became unresponsive—for example because she fell asleep or had a heart attack.
  GM took a safety-first approach in designing Super Cruise. Limiting Super Cruise to pre-mapped areas and aggressively reminding users to pay attention to the road minimizes the chances that Super Cruise will cause a crash. However it might annoy users who don't like their cars limiting what they can do.
 By contrast, Tesla has prioritized driver convenience and autonomy. Tesla allows drivers to activate Autopilot on a wide variety of roads. Early versions of the technology were even more permissive about driver engagement, allowing drivers to take their hands off the wheel for long periods. Tesla began tightening up rules requiring hands on the wheel after the  first fatal Autopilot-related crash in 2016. But Tesla's system has remained less restrictive than GM's. The lack of aggressive driver monitoring systems may have been a factor in  more recent fatal crashes involving Tesla cars.
  So while winning the overall ranking is undoubtedly good for GM, Consumer Reports' results won't do anything to dampen the enthusiasm of Tesla fans who find aggressive driver monitoring systems annoying.
 None of the other systems tested by CR stood out from the pack. Either Tesla or Cadillac won each of the five sub-categories in the CR rubric. The Lincoln/Ford Co-Pilot 360 system was the top runner-up after Tesla, followed by systems from Audi, Hyundai, Mercedes-Benz, and Subaru.
 But it's notable that these systems are becoming increasingly common in the marketplace. When CR did its first evaluation in 2018, it tested only four systems. Now there are 17 systems on the market, with almost every major auto manufacturer offering one.
  I don't mind CR dinging Tesla for their, let's call it more relaxed, approach to driver engagement, but it does seem a bit counter intuitive to give a system higher marks because it's available in fewer locations.
  Availability, however, isn't the only metric that is important. What good is availability if it's perfectly content with allowing drivers to slam into guardrails and semi-trailers?
title: 消费者报告：特斯拉Autopilot远远落后于通用超级邮轮
title_en: Consumer Reports: Tesla Autopilot a 'Distant Second' To GM Super Cruise

note:
根据昨天刚刚公开的一系列最新公布的FCC文件，苹果的iPhone12系列产品能够对外部配件进行无线充电。VentureBeat的Jeremy Horwitz最先发现的文件称，这款手机“支持内置感应充电发射器和接收器”。苹果还没有正式宣布任何这样的功能，可以用来为未来的AirPods或苹果传言已久的Tile竞争对手“AirTags”充电。
“除了可以用台式无线电能传输充电器(冰球)充电外，2020款iPhone型…。还支持360 kHz的WPT充电功能，对配件进行充电，“其中一份文件写道。它列出了一系列具有新功能的iPhone的FCC ID，其中包括iPhone12 Mini(BCG-E3539A)、iPhone12(BCG-E3542A)、iPhone12Pro(BCG-E3545A)和iPhone12Pro Max(BCG-E3548A)。如果我们正确阅读文档，最大反向无线充电速度为5W。
IPhone 12系列支持苹果新的MagSafe标准，该标准在手机内部使用磁铁来帮助正确对准兼容的配件，包括一个新的兼容QI的无线充电盘。然而，苹果还没有宣布对这款手机进行任何形式的反向无线充电，而且它们似乎无法为目前市场上的任何设备充电。
如果这份FCC文件表明，iPhone12可能具有隐藏的反向充电功能。也许是新AirPods上的MagSafe？Https://t.co/QhFQtOgoRB https://t.co/OAKzzb5U3B pic.twitter.com/pqAVcjLCyN。
-Mark Gurman(@markgurman)2020年10月28日。
听起来iPhone12的反向无线充电可能是有限的，至少一开始是这样。文件称，“目前iPhone手机唯一可以充电的配件是未来潜在的外部苹果配件”，目前“只有当手机连接到交流电源插座时，才会发生反向充电”。联邦通信委员会的测试似乎只使用了一个壁式充电器和USB-C电缆，大概是每部iPhone12捆绑的相同的USB-C to Lighting电缆。
听起来，这项技术的目的是让你减少床头柜上的充电杂乱程度，例如，对插在墙上的iPhone上的一对AirPods进行无线充电。然而，正如该文件继续建议的那样，这种情况在未来可能会改变。未来的设计和附件可能支持真正的便携使用条件，主机-客户对可以放在口袋或背包中。
目前还不清楚为什么苹果在宣布这款手机时没有正式公布这项功能，尽管这可能是因为与这一功能配合使用的配件还没有准备好发布。彭博社(Bloomberg)的马克·古尔曼(Mark Gurman)猜测，这可能会与该公司即将推出的AirPods改造相配合，本周早些时候报道了AirPods的存在。
反向无线充电功能似乎不需要太多的新硬件，至少iFixit在拆卸新手机时没有发现任何东西。
note_en:
Apple’s iPhone 12 lineup has the ability to wirelessly charge an external accessory, according to a series of newly  unveiled  FCC  filings that just went public yesterday. The documents first spotted by   VentureBeat’s Jeremy Horwitz say the phone “supports a built-in inductive charging transmitter and receiver.” Apple has not officially announced any such functionality that could be used to charge future AirPods or Apple’s long rumored Tile-competitor dubbed “ AirTags.”
 “In addition to being able to be charged by a desktop WPT [wireless power transfer] charger (puck), 2020 iPhone models … also support WPT charging function at 360 kHz to charge accessories,”  one of the documents reads. It lists a series of FCC IDs of iPhones with the new feature, which include the the iPhone 12 mini (BCG-E3539A), iPhone 12 (BCG-E3542A), iPhone 12 Pro (BCG-E3545A), and iPhone 12 Pro Max (BCG-E3548A). The maximum reverse wireless charging speed is  listed as 5W, if we’re reading the documents correctly.
 The iPhones 12 series supports Apple’s  new MagSafe standard, which uses magnets inside the phones to help properly align compatible accessories, including a new Qi-compatible wireless charging puck. However, Apple has not announced any form of reverse wireless charging for the phones, and they don’t appear capable of charging any devices currently on the market.
 If this FCC filing is any indication, the iPhone 12 may have a hidden reverse charging feature. Perhaps MagSafe on the new AirPods?  https://t.co/QhFQtOgoRB  https://t.co/OAKzzb5U3B  pic.twitter.com/pqAVcjLCyN
— Mark Gurman (@markgurman)  October 28, 2020
 It sounds like the iPhone 12’s reverse wireless charging may be limited, at least at first.  The documents say that “currently the only accessory that can be charged by iPhones is an external potential apple accessory in future” and that reverse charging currently “only occurs when the phone is connected to an AC power outlet.” The FCC’s testing appears to have been conducted using only a wall charger and USB-C cable, presumably the same USB-C to Lighting cable bundled with each iPhone 12.
 It sounds like the technology is meant to allow you to reduce the amount of charging clutter on a night stand by, for example, wirelessly charging a pair of AirPods magnetically attached to an iPhone that’s plugged into the wall. However, this may change in the future, as the document goes on to suggest. “Future designs and accessories may support true portable use condition, with the host-client pair able to be placed in a pocket or backpack.”
 It’s unclear why Apple did not officially reveal the functionality when it announced the phones themselves, though it could be because the accessory which works with the functionality isn’t yet ready to be released.  Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman speculates that it might work with the company’s upcoming AirPods revamp, whose existence was  reported earlier this week.
 The reverse wireless charging functionality doesn’t appear to require much in the way of new hardware, at least nothing that  iFixit spotted during its  teardown of the new phones.
title: 苹果的iPhone12似乎有一个秘密的无线反向充电功能
title_en: Apple's iPhone 12 Seems To Have a Secret Reverse Wireless Charging Feature

罗马/米兰(路透社)-意大利反垄断机构周三表示，正在调查Alphabet的谷歌(Google GOOGL.O)涉嫌滥用其在意大利在线展示广告市场的主导地位。
这项调查是在意大利数字广告游说团体IAB去年提出申诉之后进行的，并增加了这家硅谷科技巨头在全球面临的监管审查。
该监管机构表示，它怀疑谷歌利用通过自己的应用程序收集的大量数据，阻止竞争对手运营商进行有效竞争。该公司表示，周二对谷歌的一些办公室进行了检查。
谷歌在意大利的一位发言人在一份电子邮件声明中表示，该公司正在与意大利当局进行建设性的合作。
他补充说，监管机构关注的谷歌政策变化在一定程度上是为了让欧盟隐私法与其广告工具的运作方式相一致。
欧洲出版商理事会执行董事安吉拉·米尔斯·韦德(Angela Mills Wade)对意大利的调查表示欢迎，调查必须在2021年11月之前完成。
她表示，这家科技巨头的“无与伦比的地位”打击了“出版商，并最终打击了他们的读者，因为广告收入减少导致新闻投资减少”。
意大利在线广告市场去年创造了33亿欧元(39亿美元)的营收，横幅广告等陈列式广告占比近37%。
note_en:
ROME/MILAN (Reuters) - Italy's antitrust authority is investigating Alphabet's Google   GOOGL.O  for alleged abuse of its dominant position in the Italian online display advertising market, it said on Wednesday.
 The investigation follows a complaint filed by Italian digital advertising lobby group IAB last year, and adds to regulatory scrutiny the Silicon Valley tech giant is facing worldwide.
 The watchdog said it suspects Google of using enormous amounts of data collected through its own applications to prevent rival operators from competing effectively. It said it carried out inspections of some Google offices on Tuesday.
  A Google spokesman in Italy said in an e-mailed statement the company was working constructively with the Italian authorities.
 He added that the Google policy changes on which the watchdog was focusing were partly aimed at squaring European Union privacy law with how its advertising tools work.
 Angela Mills Wade, executive director of the European Publishers’ Council, welcomed the Italian investigation, which must be completed by Nov. 2021
  She said the tech giant’s “unrivalled position” hit “publishers and, ultimately, their readers as less advertising revenue leads to less investment in journalism”.
 The Italian online advertising market generated revenue of 3.3 billion euros ($3.9 billion) last year, with display advertising, such as banner ads, accounting for nearly 37%.
title: 在IAB意大利提出申诉后，意大利反垄断机构调查谷歌涉嫌滥用其在在线展示广告市场的主导地位
title_en: Italy's antitrust authority to investigate Google for alleged abuse of its dominant position in the online display ad market, following a complaint by IAB Italy
